overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic rooftop garden in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring manicured landscaping with geometric planters, palm trees, and striped grass patterns. The camera moves steadily through the garden toward a distant city skyline with tall glass buildings and a prominent communications tower, passing a maintenance worker near the end.

A tall futuristic communications tower dominates the right side of the view, while modern glass skyscrapers rise in the background. Small water features and rock formations dot the landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a manicured rooftop garden that gradually opens up to reveal a sprawling futuristic city skyline. It begins by moving forward through a modern entrance lined with black rectangular planters and polished concrete, heading toward a large central tree under a clear blue sky. As the camera circles this mature tree, the concrete gives way to distinctive striped grass patterns and stone stairs, shifting the perspective to uncover towering glass skyscrapers in the distance. The scene then expands along winding pathways dotted with rock formations and small water features, with a massive communications tower dominating the right side of the frame. Finally, the camera passes a maintenance worker in a yellow safety vest before gliding into a grove of tall palm trees that stretch across the striped lawn toward the horizon.
